code: import React from'react';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const StatsRow=_ref=>{let{bookings}=_ref;const total=bookings.length;const pending=bookings.filter(b=>b.stat==='Pending').length;const completed=bookings.filter(b=>b.stat==='Completed').length;const revenue=bookings.filter(b=>b.stat==='Completed').reduce((acc,b)=>acc+(parseInt(b.amount)||0),0);const fmt=n=>n.toLocaleString('en-IN');return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"stats-row",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"stat-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"stat-label",children:"Total Bookings"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"stat-value",style:{color:'#085041'},children:total})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"stat-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"stat-label",children:"Pending"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"stat-value",style:{color:'#BA7517'},children:pending})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"stat-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"stat-label",children:"Completed"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"stat-value",style:{color:'#1D9E75'},children:completed})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"stat-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"stat-label",children:"Total Revenue"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"stat-value",style:{color:'#534AB7',fontSize:20},children:["\u20B9",fmt(revenue)]})]})]});};export default StatsRow;
